items.title: Assign real reviewers to roles
items.reason: The policy defines roles, but named reviewers have not been assigned.
items.next_action: Assign data reviewers, corpus maintainers, and legal reviewers.

items.title: Work the formal review packets
items.reason: The 532 review packets still require actual decisions.
items.next_action: Use /app/review-packets and /app/review to log packet decisions.

items.title: Publish an operating SOP
items.reason: The machine-readable policy exists, but operational SOP training is separate.
items.next_action: Write reviewer training and escalation instructions for production use.
